Class HighScore

java.lang.Object
io.github.project516.NumberGuessingGame.HighScore
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<HighScore>
public class HighScore extends Object implements Comparable<HighScore>
Represents a single high score entry in the Number Guessing Game. Each entry contains a username and the number of guesses it took to win the game.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructor
    Description
    HighScore(String username, int numberOfGuesses)
    Constructs a new HighScore entry.

  • Constructor Details

    • HighScore

      public HighScore(String username, int numberOfGuesses)
      Constructs a new HighScore entry.
      Parameters:
      username - the username of the player
      numberOfGuesses - the number of guesses it took to win
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if username is null or empty, or if numberOfGuesses is less than 1

  • Method Details

    • getUsername

      public String getUsername()
      Gets the username for this high score entry.
      Returns:
      the username

    • getNumberOfGuesses

      public int getNumberOfGuesses()
      Gets the number of guesses for this high score entry.
      Returns:
      the number of guesses

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(HighScore other)
      Compares this high score to another. High scores are ordered by number of guesses (ascending) so that lower scores (fewer guesses) come first.
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<HighScore>
      Parameters:
      other - the other high score to compare to
      Returns:
      a negative integer, zero, or a positive integer as this high score is less than, equal to, or greater than the specified high score

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
